title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library that wraps the Ollama REST API for chatting, generating embeddings, pulling models, and listing local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, offering the same chat, embed, and model management endpoints as the Python lib.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing Ollama LLM and embedding classes so you can swap local models into any LangChain chain or agent.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, markdown, and user management.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama exposing sync/async APIs for chat, generate, embeddings, and model operations.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight Retrieval-Augmented-Generation template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for question-answering over documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets server members chat with any local Ollama model through slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Rich-terminal chat client with markdown rendering, syntax highlighting, conversation save/load, and multi-model support.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Neovim plugin that adds local AI completion via Ollama, mimicking GitHub Copilot inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for building local NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate offering strongly-typed async wrappers around the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, and embeddings.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Tiny Bash library that wraps curl to expose Ollama endpoints as shell functions for scripting.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command for chatting with local models in any channel or DM.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and PVC support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation that builds Ollama from source and exposes each model as an overridable package for reproducible deployments.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: DBeaver extension that adds SQL query generation and explanation using local Ollama models inside the database IDE.

title: ollama-chat-nextjs
summary: Minimal Next.js starter showing how to build a ChatGPT-like UI backed by an Ollama server via the ollama-js client.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local AI assistance for summarizing notes, generating follow-ups, and Q&A inside your vault.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Unofficial Elixir client using Finch/Tesla for HTTP, offering GenServer-backed chat processes and streaming for Phoenix apps.
